purpose: Divide context into governed cognitive spaces on top of STS: private planning, response drafting, response review, durable artifact workspace, memory retrieval, and visible report.

stream_roles.system_policy_stream: Non-negotiable local policy, anti-cheat rules, teacher limits, and public/private evidence boundaries.
stream_roles.context_stream: Immediate task, benchmark wall, active goal, and available local reports.
stream_roles.personality_stream: Compact personality/core orientation and anti-drift invariants.
stream_roles.memory_context_stream: Retrieved durable context packets and stale/superseded lane markers.
stream_roles.internal_monologue_stream: Private planning-summary tokens and action tags; no raw hidden chain is exposed or promoted.
stream_roles.artifact_workspace_stream: Long-horizon artifact build space: reports, ledgers, specs, patches, and next-state records.
stream_roles.mouthpiece_draft_stream: Candidate user-facing response text before final review.
stream_roles.response_review_stream: Truth, no-cheat, safety, provenance, and overclaim review before visible output.
stream_roles.visible_report_stream: Final public/user-visible response or operational report.

blocked_visible_patterns: promotion allowed because private pressure passed
